allow: Bash(sqlite3 data/localforge.db "SELECT id, status, session_type, started_at, ended_at, CASE WHEN ended_at IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE ROUND\(\(julianday\(ended_at\) - julianday\(started_at\)\) * 86400, 0\) END AS duration_seconds FROM agent_sessions WHERE project_id = 2 AND session_type = 'coding' ORDER BY started_at;")

Bash(node -e "const Database = require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db = new Database\('./data/localforge.db', {readonly:true}\); const rows = db.prepare\(\\"SELECT id, status, session_type, started_at, ended_at FROM agent_sessions WHERE project_id=2 AND session_type='coding' ORDER BY started_at\\"\).all\(\); const parse = s => s ? \(s.includes\('T'\) ? Date.parse\(s\) : Date.parse\(s.replace\(' ','T'\)+'Z'\)\) : null; let total=0; const intervals=[]; for \(const r of rows\) { const s=parse\(r.started_at\), e=parse\(r.ended_at\); if \(s&&e&&e>s\) intervals.push\([s,e,r]\); } intervals.sort\(\(a,b\)=>a[0]-b[0]\); let merged=[]; for \(const iv of intervals\) { if \(!merged.length||iv[0]>merged[merged.length-1][1]\) merged.push\([iv[0], iv[1]]\); else merged[merged.length-1][1] = Math.max\(merged[merged.length-1][1], iv[1]\); } const sum = merged.reduce\(\(a,i\) => a + \(i[1]-i[0]\), 0\); console.log\('session count:', rows.length\); console.log\('with ended_at:', intervals.length\); console.log\('merged intervals:', merged.length\); console.log\('top durations \(mins\):'\); intervals.map\(\([s,e,r]\) => \({id:r.id, status:r.status, mins:\(\(e-s\)/60000\).toFixed\(1\)}\)\).sort\(\(a,b\)=>Number\(b.mins\)-Number\(a.mins\)\).slice\(0,12\).forEach\(r=>console.log\(r\)\); console.log\('sum merged \(h\):', \(sum/3600000\).toFixed\(2\)\);")
